text: Computer vision is a field of artificial intelligence that enables computers to see and understand images. It involves two main tasks: image recognition, which identifies what is in a picture, and object detection, which finds and locates specific items. For example, a system can recognise a face or detect a car in a photo. Computer vision has many practical applications. It is used in security cameras to spot unusual activity, in smartphones for facial recognition, and especially in self-driving cars to identify traffic signs, pedestrians, and other vehicles. This technology helps autonomous vehicles make safe decisions while driving.
